_comment: Ground-truth probe expectations for shark.jpg on the jet-ski-cruise scene. Paths relative to this file (assets/). NOTE: shark_appears is expected TRUE (a shark fin IS in the frame) but the small/soft fin can read as a dolphin on the 12B VLM, so this assertion documents a KNOWN false negative — it may FAIL until a clearer frame or stronger model. subject_out_of_frame is the general must-stay-clean invariant (any subject scene). submerged is scene-SPECIFIC — it only derives on water/vehicle scenes whose identity text has 'never sink'/'underwater' markers, so it applies here but is not a universal check. duplicate_subject is no longer derived: its markers moved to the player layer, which derive_probes doesn't scan.
